name: Marinated Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place chicken breasts in the marinade, ensuring they are well-coated.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to develop.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill chicken for 6 minutes per side until cooked through and juices run clear.
6. Turn off grill and let the chicken rest before serving.
